commit_scope: Expand the influence teaching translator beyond audiobooks into physical books, music, podcasts, practices, gatherings, retreats, rituals, and formative technical work, with API coverage kinds for efficient discovery.

commands: python3 scripts/influence_teaching_translator.py --slug urs-field-story --limit 80 | jq '{available: .totals.available_rows, joined: .totals.joined_cc_rows, kinds: .totals.coverage_kinds}'
cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_field_story_trace_index.py tests/test_field_story_agent_surface.py
cd api && python3 -m ruff check app/services/influence_teaching_translator_service.py tests/test_field_story_trace_index.py
git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main --autostash
local_validation.summary: JSON validation, CLI readback, focused translator API/MCP test, related field-story tests, ruff, evidence validation, py_compile, maintainability audit, diff whitespace check, runtime web/API verification, rebase, local PR guard, and follow-through check pass. CLI readback shows 37 available rows, 33 joined CC rows, and coverage kinds spanning physical reading, music, podcasts, practices, gatherings, retreats, rituals, research, and formative technical work. Runtime verification passed on rerun after an initial warm-cache automation usage timing miss.

ci_validation.details: Pending push, PR creation, and GitHub check monitoring.

deploy_validation.details: Pending merge to main and public deploy verification.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Humans and agents can now discover the full influence body through the translator instead of seeing an audiobook-only surface, and can inspect coverage kinds before loading deeper traces.
test_flows: Artifact flow contains at least 35 rows including physical books, music, podcasts, embodied practices, gatherings, retreats, rituals, and formative technical work.
API flow returns totals.coverage_kinds so callers can cheaply sense coverage.
API flow joins current CC for traced rows such as Karl May stories, Mose, Lex Fridman, and Ecstatic Dance.
API flow keeps event/ritual placeholders such as StarHouse visible with zero current CC when they are not yet in the computed CC pool.

phase_gate.reason: Local implementation validation and pre-push gates are complete; push, PR CI, merge, and public deploy validation remain.
